'''rashaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huck|huck]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huck|huck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rashaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræshægæth|ræshægæth]] || [[word:ræshægæj|ræshægæj]] || [[word:ræshægæsh|ræshægæsh]] || [[word:ræshægæ|ræshægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rashashagath|rashashagath]] || [[word:rashashagaj|rashashagaj]] || [[word:rashashagash|rashashagash]] || [[word:rashashaga|rashashaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rashagath|rashagath]] || [[word:rashagaj|rashagaj]] || [[word:rashagash|rashagash]] || [[word:rashaga|rashaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rashafgath|rashafgath]] || [[word:rashafgaj|rashafgaj]] || [[word:rashafgash|rashafgash]] || [[word:rashafgaf|rashafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rashagatha|rashagatha]] || [[word:rashagaja|rashagaja]] || [[word:rashagasha|rashagasha]] || [[word:rashagaka|rashagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rashagath|rashagath]] || [[word:rashagaj|rashagaj]] || [[word:rashagash|rashagash]] || [[word:rashaga|rashaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rashagathal|rashagathal]] || [[word:rashagajal|rashagajal]] || [[word:rashagashal|rashagashal]] || [[word:rashagakal|rashagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rashagathatha|rashagathatha]] || [[word:rashagajaja|rashagajaja]] || [[word:rashagashasha|rashagashasha]] || [[word:rashagaka|rashagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rashagathan|rashagathan]] || [[word:rashagajan|rashagajan]] || [[word:rashagashan|rashagashan]] || [[word:rashagakan|rashagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rashagathaoro|rashagathaoro]] || [[word:rashagajaoro|rashagajaoro]] || [[word:rashagashaoro|rashagashaoro]] || [[word:rashagakaoro|rashagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
